# Define normalization function
import re, unicodedata
def normalize(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    # remove tashkeel
    s = re.sub(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0656-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

target_full = "تعلموا القرآن وغنوا به وأفشوه"
norm_target = normalize(target_full)
norm_target
